summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EasyLeaz vehicle management system with condition field (neuf/occasion), multi-image upload functionality, admin panel, and frontend integration. All major backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Form fields not found with expected selectors on landing page
FAQ questions not found with expected data-testid selectors

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/vehicles creates vehicle with condition field (neuf/occasion)
Backend: PUT /api/vehicles/{id} updates vehicle fields including condition
Backend: POST /api/vehicles/{id}/images uploads images successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/vehicles/{id}/images/{image_id} removes images correctly
Backend: POST /api/vehicles/{id}/main-image sets main image successfully
Backend: GET /api/uploads/vehicles/{filename} serves uploaded images (404 for non-existent files)
Backend: DELETE /api/vehicles/{id} deletes vehicle and its images
Backend: GET /api/vehicles?condition=neuf filters by neuf vehicles
Backend: GET /api/vehicles?condition=occasion filters by occasion vehicles
Backend: All authentication endpoints working correctly
Frontend: Admin login with admin@easyleaz.ch / easyleaz2024 works
Frontend: Admin vehicle manager loads with filter dropdown (all/occasion/neuf)
Frontend: Admin vehicle form has all required fields (brand, model, year, mileage, fuel, transmission, price, monthly, condition, badge)
Frontend: Admin vehicle cards show 'Photos' upload button
Frontend: Admin vehicle cards show condition labels (Neuf/Occasion)
Frontend: Admin vehicle cards have edit and delete buttons
Frontend: Vehicle creation form works with condition selection
Frontend: Vehicle filtering by condition works in admin panel
Frontend: Catalog page /catalogue loads with vehicle cards showing images
Frontend: Catalog page has working tabs (Occasion/Neuf) with URL updates
Frontend: Catalog page has working sort dropdown with multiple options
Frontend: Catalog vehicle cards display pricing, specs, and CTA buttons
Frontend: Landing page loads with all sections (Hero, Vehicle CTA, About, Process, Contact)
Frontend: Vehicle CTA section 'Voir le catalogue' button navigates to /catalogue
Frontend: Navbar 'Catalogue' link works correctly
Frontend: No vehicle cards present on landing page (correctly removed)
Frontend: About section displays with correct content
Frontend: Process section shows 3 steps correctly
Frontend: Contact section displays phone and location information
